news.title: Citadel-backed EDX Markets applies for U.S. trust charter to expand institutional crypto services
news.summary: The Citadel-backed exchange is seeking approval to offer custody and asset services as institutional demand grows.

news.title: Solana DeFi platform Drift confirms 'active attack' as $200M+ leaves platform
news.summary: The platform halted deposits while it investigates suspicious activity and urges users to proceed with caution.

news.title: Galaxy Digital's testnet suffers hack but no client funds or information were compromised
news.summary: Mike Novogratz’s crypto financial services firm said unauthorized access was limited to a segregated R&D workspace; trading systems and client accounts were unaffected.
